metadata.title: Example Project MCP Servers
metadata.description: MCP server configuration demonstrating variable substitution with both ${VAR} and {{{ VAR }}} syntax
metadata.author: Development Team

filesystem.description: Provides filesystem access for reading and writing files. Uses PrompTrek-style variable syntax.

git.description: Git repository operations and version control

github.description: GitHub API access for issues, PRs, and repository management. Uses MCP-standard ${VAR} syntax.

postgres.description: PostgreSQL database access. Both connection string and password use PrompTrek-style variables.

brave-search.description: Web search capabilities using Brave Search API. Uses PrompTrek-style variable.

fetch.description: HTTP fetch capabilities for retrieving web content

playwright.description: Browser automation and web scraping with Playwright

sqlite.description: SQLite database access for local data storage
